texto: We sometimes fail to realise that when we pray to Allah we are in fact performing a great act of ibadah (worship). On the surface it might seem as if we are asking out of self-interest, but we are really proving the sincerity of our belief in the tauhid (Oneness) of Allah and our submission to the True God. Thus the Prophet pbuh said: "Supplication is itself the worship." (Reported by Abu Daud and al-Tirmizi, sahih.) If a servant prays the whole night to Allah, he therefore performs a great ibadah all night long.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mohd Asri Zainul Abidin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “We sometimes fail to realise that when we pray to Allah we are in fact performing a great act of …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, islam, spirituality pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

texto: Islam is not man's ultimate justification to do as he pleases--it is, instead, a religion built on reason and evidence. If each of us asks the ustaz for the causes of his religious opinions, then we should, by doing so, help realise the principles of Islam and thus improve intellectual discussion in our own community.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mohd Asri Zainul Abidin sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “Islam is not man's ultimate justification to do as he pleases--it is, instead, a religion built o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, islam, religion, útil em momentos de religion e thought.
